← The Foundations

The Foundations · Build to last

Your first hire

Know whether your next hire is a 1099 or a W-2, and what each one really requires, with a decision worksheet and a starter job description.

90 minutes · live, small group

What we'll cover

  • 1099 contractor vs. W-2 employee — the real differences
  • What each actually requires of you (taxes, paperwork, risk)
  • Writing a starter job description
  • A simple decision worksheet for your situation

What you'll walk out with

A hire-type decision worksheet and a starter job description.

The Foundations open this fall (2026). Be first to hear — and grab a free hour in the meantime — at Coffee with Quinta.

Join the waitlist Start free: Coffee with Quinta

Educational only — not legal or HR/employment advice. Confirm with an employment attorney or HR pro.

Questions, answered

About this class

1

Who is Your first hire for?

Established women founders ready to take this further. It's part of The Foundations, the plain-language business fundamentals track.

2

Do I need any experience?

None — every Quinta & Co. class is plain language and hands-on.

3

What will I walk out with?

A hire-type decision worksheet and a starter job description. Every Quinta & Co. class ends with something real you keep.

4

When can I take this class?

Enrollment opens Fall 2026. Join the waitlist at quintaand.co/waitlist to hear first — and the free monthly Coffee with Quinta is open in the meantime.

Quinta & Co.

Practical business & AI education · Dallas, Texas & online

Quinta & Co. classes are educational and are not legal, tax, financial, or HR/employment advice. For decisions about your specific situation, please consult a qualified professional.
